description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests - JellyfishSDK that runs on workflow dispatch and pull requests to the master branch. The workflow should build and test JellyfishSDK in a multi-job process. The build job runs in a container, sets up dependencies, builds binaries, and uploads them as artifacts. The test job runs in parallel across multiple instances, downloads the binaries, builds a Docker image, checks out the JellyfishSDK repository, sets up Node.js, and runs tests.
